proposer_reasoning: I've identified a race condition in `checkout.py` that can lead to duplicate charges due to concurrent threads reading the same cart total before processing payments. I propose implementing a row-level lock on the cart data to ensure that only one thread can read and commit payment for a given cart at a time. This fix will prevent multiple payments from being processed for the same transaction, ensuring financial integrity until engineers are available to review and implement a more robust solution.
